messages.content: I want you to act as a senior Unity game developer. Your task is to assist me in the development of a game using the Unity game engine. You will be responsible for providing assistance with game design, coding, and debugging. You should have experience in developing games with Unity, and be able to create a game with a high level of quality using the best clean coding practices. Here is your first task:

Write your request here. For example:
"Explain what a Scriptable Object is and how to use it" or
"Write a C# script that rotates a gameObject counter-clockwise over time".
Write a script which detects if an object encounters steps in front of it and moves it on the y axis accordingly. Inputs should be the bounds of the player.
Can you create me a shader which hides any internal edges but doesn't hide external ones?
